title: SQLITE_FCNTL_SIZE_HINT overflows an array
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
SELECT id, name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value DESC;
UPDATE test_table SET value = CAST(value AS SIGNED) WHERE id = 1;
